inspection_target: action and index data feed moduli counts; compactness and gluing feed d^2=0 and products
validation: graph is acyclic and covers all seven sections

inspection_target: each edge points from higher action to lower action and records positive energy
representation: finite chain model plus action-drop diagram
validation: energy equals action drop and boundary-squared-zero holds mod 2

inspection_target: a class becomes visible precisely when the action cutoff crosses its representative
validation: selected spectral values are in the finite action spectrum

inspection_target: PSS turns the pair-of-pants product into quantum multiplication
representation: commuting square plus quantum multiplication table
validation: unit and associativity in the toy quantum ring

inspection_target: reversing the Hamiltonian reverses action and degree while the pairing stays nondegenerate
validation: pairing determinant is nonzero and product pairing agrees with the top coefficient

inspection_target: Hamiltonian loops twist the Floer complex and shift spectral values by a section area
representation: invertible quantum multiplication and finite category graph
validation: Seidel multiplication is invertible and category composition is associative

concept: vortex equations and moment Floer connection
inspection_target: the small-epsilon penalty pushes maps toward mu=0 before quotienting
representation: moment-level contour and adiabatic penalty curves
validation: numerical minimum lies on the expected moment level
